Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.439

Title: Extends certain provisions relating to a Long Island deer management pilot program
Summary: Extends certain provisions relating to a Long Island deer management pilot program for an additional 3 years.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 704 of the laws of 2023 amending the environmental conservation law relating to a Long Island deer management pilot program, in relation to the effectiveness thereof
